consumerTone: plain English; educational musculoskeletal DNA context only; no diagnosis, treatment, injury-risk, pain-cause, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, imaging, lab, or exercise-clearance claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated musculoskeletal DNA score, diagnostic evidence, treatment evidence, injury-risk model, pain model, arthritis model, EDS model, osteoporosis model, bone-density evidence, imaging evidence, lab evidence, exercise-clearance context, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived fitness-trait evidence for musculoskeletal-dna-report validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable musculoskeletal DNA sections explicitly; do not infer diagnosis, treatment need, injury risk, pain causes, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, bone density, imaging findings, lab findings, training response, or exercise clearance.

referenceResources.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores

reportPurpose: Consumer Musculoskeletal DNA Report context using derived ACTN3 and ACE evidence plus explicit diagnosis, treatment, injury, pain, arthritis, bone-density, imaging, lab, and model-unavailable framing.
